problem id: 412186a6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(5)

examples:
  00000110 -> 00000000
  11000011 -> 00000110
  10110111 -> 00000101
  01100000 -> 00000011
  10001011 -> 00000100
  10110101 -> 00000101
  10100011 -> 00000101
  11011001 -> 00000110

query: 11100111
predicted answer: 00000111
